DP.361.0000:
Excuse me, do you have a moment?\f
Can you describe your feelings when
you’re about to begin a battle?\f
I also want to know how you feel
when you win, lose, or become\r
number one.\f
DP.361.0001:
OK, how do you feel when
you’re about to begin a match?\f
DP.361.0002:
How do you feel when you win
a match?\f
DP.361.0003: How do you feel when you lose a match?\f
DP.361.0004:
Last question: describe how you’d feel
if you became number one.\f
DP.361.0005:
Hunh? You changed your mind?
I guess you’re fickle.
DP.361.0006:
Thank you!
Can you answer another question?
